```erlang
-module(solution).
-include_lib("eunit/include/eunit.hrl").

solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Dist = lists:map(fun(_) -> 0 end, lists:seq(1, N)),
    Visited = lists:map(fun(_) -> false end, lists:seq(1, N)),
    Queue = [1], % Using 1-based index
    Dist1 = lists:map(fun(_) -> 0 end, lists:seq(1, N)),
    Visited1 = lists:map(fun(_) -> false end, lists:seq(1, N)),
    {_, Result} = bfs(nums, N, Dist1, Visited1, Queue),

bfs(nums, N, Dist, Visited, Queue) ->
    case Queue of
        [] -> {Dist, N};
        [I | Rest] ->
            case I of
                N -> {Dist, N};
                _ ->
                    % Move to adjacent cells
                    Adjacent = [I-1, I+1],
                    NewQueue = lists:foldl(
                        fun(J, Acc) ->
                            case J of
                                J when J >= 1, J =< N, not Visited(J) ->
                                    NewDist = Dist(J) + 1,
                                    NewVisited = Visited(J) + 1,
                                    NewQueue = Acc ++ [J],
                                    NewDist;
                                _ -> Acc
                            end
                        end, Rest, Adjacent),
                    % Prime teleport
                    case is_prime(nums[I-1]) of
                        true ->
                            P = nums[I-1],
                            NewQueue1 = lists:foldl(
                                fun(J, Acc) ->
                                    case J of
                                        J when J >= 1, J =< N, J /= I, not Visited(J), nums[J-1] rem P == 0 ->
                                        NewDist = Dist(J) + 1,
                                        NewVisited = Visited(J) + 1,
                                        NewQueue1 = Acc ++ [J],
                                        NewDist;
                                        _ -> Acc
                                    end
                                end, NewQueue, lists:seq(1, N)),
                            bfs(nums, N, Dist, Visited, NewQueue1);
                        false ->
                            bfs(nums, N, Dist, Visited, NewQueue)
                    end
            end
    end.

is_prime(N) ->
    case N of
        1 -> false;
        2 -> true;
        _ ->
            case lists:all(
                fun(I) -> I * I > N orelse N rem I /= 0 end,
                lists:seq(2, trunc(math:sqrt(N))))
            of
                true -> true;
                false -> false
            end
    end.
```

```erlang
-module(solution).
-include_lib("eunit/include/eunit.hrl").

solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Dist = lists:map(fun(_) -> 0 end, lists:seq(1, N)),
    Visited = lists:map(fun(_) -> false end, lists:seq(1, N)),
    Queue = [1], % Using 1-based index
    Dist1 = lists:map(fun(_) -> 0 end, lists:seq(1, N)),
    Visited1 = lists:map(fun(_) -> false end, lists:seq(1, N)),
    {_, Result} = bfs(nums, N, Dist1, Visited1, Queue),

    Result.

bfs(nums, N, Dist, Visited, Queue) ->
    case Queue of
        [] -> {Dist, 0};
        [I | Rest] ->
            case I of
                N -> {Dist, 0};
                _ ->
                    % Move to adjacent cells
                    Adjacent = [I - 1, I + 1],
                    NewQueue = lists:foldl(
                        fun(J, Acc) ->
                            case J of
                                J when J >= 1, J =< N ->
                                    case lists:nth(J, Visited) of
                                        false ->
                                            NewDist = lists:sublist(Dist, J-1) ++ [Dist[I] + 1] ++ lists:sublist(Dist, J+1, N - J),
                                            NewVisited = lists:sublist(Visited, J-1) ++ [true] ++ lists:sublist(Visited, J+1, N - J),
                                            lists:append(Acc, [J]);
                                        _ -> Acc
                                    end
                            end
                        end, Rest, Adjacent),
                    % Prime teleport
                    P = lists:nth(I, nums),
                    case is_prime(P) of
                        true ->
                            NewQueue1 = lists:foldl(
                                fun(J, Acc) ->
                                    case J of
                                        J when J >= 1, J =< N, J /= I ->
                                            case lists:nth(J, nums) rem P == 0 andalso not lists:nth(J, Visited) of
                                                true ->
                                                    NewDist1 = lists:sublist(Dist, J-1) ++ [lists:nth(I, Dist) + 1] ++ lists:sublist(Dist, J+1, N - J),
                                                    NewVisited1 = lists:sublist(Visited, J-1) ++ [true] ++ lists:sublist(Visited, J+1, N - J),
                                                    lists:append(Acc, [J]);
                                                _ -> Acc
                                    end
                                end, NewQueue, lists:seq(1, N)),
                            bfs(nums, N, Dist, Visited, NewQueue1)
                        false ->
                            bfs(nums, N, Dist, Visited, NewQueue)
                    end
            end
    end.

is_prime(N) ->
    is_prime(N, 2).

is_prime(1, _) -> false;
is_prime(2, _) -> true;
is_prime(N, I) when I * I > N -> true;
is_prime(N, I) when N rem I == 0 -> false;
is_prime(N, I) -> is_prime(N, I + 1).
```

```erlang
-spec solve(list()) -> integer().
solve(nums) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Dist = lists:foldl(fun(_, D) -> D ++ [0] end, lists:range(0, N-1), []),
    Visited = lists:foldl(fun(_, V) -> V ++ [false] end, lists:range(0, N-1), []),
    Queue = [0],
    Dist0 = lists:map(fun(_) -> 0 end, lists:range(0, N-1)),
    Visited0 = lists:map(fun(_) -> false end, lists:range(0, N-1)),
    {_, Result} = bfs(nums, N, Dist0, Visited0, Queue, 0).

bfs(_, N, Dist, Visited, Queue, _) when length(Queue) == 0 ->
    {Dist, lists:last(Dist)};
bfs(nums, N, Dist, Visited, [I | Queue], Steps) ->
    case I of
        N-1 -> {Dist, Steps};
        _ ->
            % Move to adjacent cells
            Adjacent = [I-1, I+1],
            NewQueue = lists:foldl(
                fun(J, Q) ->
                    case J of
                        J when J >= 0, J < N, not lists:nth(J+1, Visited) ->
                            NewDist = lists:sublist(Dist, J) ++ [Steps + 1] ++ lists:sublist(Dist, J+2, N - J - 1),
                            NewVisited = lists:sublist(Visited, J) ++ [true] ++ lists:sublist(Visited, J+2, N - J - 1),
                            Q ++ [J];
                        _ -> Q
                    end
                end, Queue, Adjacent),
            % Prime teleport
            case is_prime(nums[I]) of
                true ->
                    P = nums[I],
                    NewQueue2 = lists:foldl(
                        fun(J, Q) ->
                            case J of
                                J when J /= I, not lists:nth(J+1, Visited), (nums[J] rem P) == 0 ->
                                    NewDist = lists:sublist(Dist, J) ++ [min(lists:nth(J+1, Dist), Steps + 1)] ++ lists:sublist(Dist, J+2, N - J - 1),
                                    NewVisited = lists:sublist(Visited, J) ++ [true] ++ lists:sublist(Visited, J+2, N - J - 1),
                                    Q ++ [J];
                                _ -> Q
                            end
                        end, NewQueue, lists:seq(0, N-1));
                false ->
                    NewQueue2 = NewQueue
            end,
            bfs(nums, N, Dist, Visited, NewQueue2, Steps + 1)
            end.

is_prime(Num) ->
    is_prime(Num, 2, 1).

is_prime(_, I, J) when I * I > Num -> true;
is_prime(Num, I, J) when Num rem I == 0 -> false;
is_prime(Num, I, J) -> is_prime(Num, I + 1, J + 1).
```
